atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain in the upper right leg following a bowling injury

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Tenderness to palpation is noted on the upper right leg

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports mild bruising on the back of his right leg

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a history of atopic eczema

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes Mobic 15 milligrams once daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends ice packs for 20 minutes every 2-3 hours

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders follow-up in one week if symptoms do not improve

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a history of colectomy for diverticulitis
